seo.title: Building Agentic RAG with Mastra + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build agentic rag with Mastra + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building Agentic RAG with Mastra enables sophisticated multi-step retrieval agents that plan queries, fetch from diverse sources, and synthesize attributed responses. However, the autonomous nature of these agents introduces risks like hallucinated synthesis, unfaithful source attribution, and inconsistent cross-source reasoning. Vex provides essential guardrails as middleware to validate outputs, detect failures, and ensure reliability at every pipeline stage.

architectureOverview.heading: Agentic RAG Architecture with Mastra
architectureOverview.description:
Mastra's Agentic RAG typically features a planner agent that decomposes user queries into sub-queries, routed to specialized retrievers (vector stores, web search, knowledge bases). Retrieved chunks feed a synthesizer agent that reasons across sources, generates responses with citations, and optionally refines via critique loops. Workflows orchestrate transitions with memory for context persistence.

The pipeline processes inputs through Mastra's WorkflowNode graph: Query вҶ’ Plan вҶ’ Retrieve вҶ’ Synthesize вҶ’ Validate вҶ’ Respond. Agents leverage tools for retrieval and LLM calls for planning/synthesis, with Mastra's memory layer injecting prior context.

Vex integrates as middleware at node transitions, wrapping agent executions to verify outputs against faithfulness, consistency, and formatting specs before proceeding.

risks.name: Workflow step outputs not validated between transitions
risks.description: Planner outputs malformed sub-queries that fail retrievers, or synthesizer ignores retrievals
risks.mitigation: Vex middleware schemas enforce structured outputs at each Mastra WorkflowNode transition

risks.name: Agent tool calls returning malformed data
risks.description: Retrievers return non-standard chunk formats breaking citation tracking
risks.mitigation: Vex tool result validators parse and normalize retrieval payloads before synthesis

risks.name: Memory retrieval injecting stale context
risks.description: Mastra memory injects outdated conversation history confusing current retrieval planning
risks.mitigation: Vex temporal consistency checks filter stale memory entries by recency and relevance

risks.name: Sync integration data causing agent confusion
risks.description: Real-time data sources conflict with cached knowledge bases during multi-source synthesis
risks.mitigation: Vex cross-source consistency scoring flags and resolves data conflicts pre-response

implementation.title: Synthesis with Source Attribution
implementation.description: Final agent generates response with verifiable citations

vexIntegration.title: Vex Middleware for Workflow Transitions
vexIntegration.description: Wrap Mastra node executions with Vex verification at each step

vexIntegration.description: Validate retrieved chunks match planned subqueries

vexIntegration.title: Final Response Citation Verification
vexIntegration.description: Ensure synthesized answer faithfully uses verified sources

cta.heading: Secure Your Mastra Agentic RAG
cta.description: Integrate Vex middleware today to achieve production-grade reliability for your autonomous retrieval agents.
